reference: I think you should get checked with an X-ray or a magnetic resonance imaging scan to see if there is any bone fracture or a ligament tear. You can feel free to consult an orthopedic specialist if you find one nearby. Furthermore, you can contact a physiotherapist who will definitely help you address your swelling issues.
text: I think you should get checked with an X-ray or a magnetic resonance imaging scan to see if there is any bone fracture or a ligament tear. You can feel free to consult an orthopedic specialist if you find one nearby. Furthermore, you can contact a physiotherapist who will definitely help you address your swelling issues.
